title: Room Upgrade
description: Redeem for a room upgrade and turn a booking into a memorable experience. Perfect for VIP tiers and special occasions.

title: Late Checkout
description: Enjoy extra time with a perk that feels luxurious and costs little. Great for weekend getaways and loyalty milestones.

title: Breakfast for Two
description: A classic reward that upgrades the stay and increases satisfaction. Ideal for family and couples campaigns.

title: Tour Credit
description: Credit toward a tour or activity that makes the trip feel bigger. Use it to upsell experiences and increase repeat bookings.

title: Transfer Discount
description: Discount on airport transfer that removes friction and improves the full journey. Great for premium positioning.

title: Booking Credit
description: A small travel credit that motivates the next booking sooner. Best as a milestone redemption for frequent travelers.
